nasb.text: By You I have been sustained from my birth; You are He who took me from my mother’s womb; My praise is continually of You.

esv.text: Upon you I have leaned from before my birth; you are he who took me from my mother’s womb. My praise is continually of you.

cnv.text: 我自出母胎就倚賴你， 把我從母腹中領出來的就是你， 我要常常讚美你。

ccb.text: 你使我出了母胎， 我从出生就依靠你， 我要永远赞美你。

csbs.text: 我在母腹中就依赖你， 是你从母胎中把我接出来， 我要常常赞美你。
